items.title: Finger.exe & ClickFix, (Sun, Nov 16th)
items.content: <article>The finger.exe command is used in ClickFix attacks.</article>

items.title: Honeypot: FortiWeb CVE-2025-64446 Exploits, (Sat, Nov 15th)
items.content: <article>Like many have reported, we too noticed exploit attempts for CVE-2025-64446 in our honeypots.</article>

items.title: Digital Doppelgangers: Anatomy of Evolving Impersonation Campaigns Distributing Gh0st RAT
items.author: Keerthiraj Nagaraj, Vishwa Thothathri, Nabeel Mohamed and Reethika Ramesh
items.content: Two campaigns delivering Gh0st RAT to Chinese speakers show a deep understanding of the target population's virtual environment and online behavior.
